appDescription.message: Mantém os sites em modo claro, independentemente das configurações do modo escuro do seu sistema.

unsupportedPage.description: Popup: shown when the current page cannot be controlled

reloadHint.description: Popup: hint that toggling reloads the page

siteApplied.description: Popup: site status when light mode is applied

siteExcluded.description: Popup: site status when the site is excluded
